name: irg-ftr-platform-v5
description: IRG FTR Master Platform v5.0 - Complete Consultant, Rating & Redemption Modules

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.prisma:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.firebase:deploy:hosting: npm run build:frontend && firebase deploy --only hosting

author: Rohit Tidke - Intech Research Group
